headline: Assessing eBay (EBAY) Valuation After A Strong Year Of Shareholder Returns
summary: Why eBay stock is drawing attention now eBay (EBAY) is back on many watchlists after a strong recent run, with the share price showing double digit gains over the past month and the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for eBay. The recent move has added to a broader upswing, with a 30 day share price return of 17.56% and year to date share price return of 21.33%, alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 60.76%. This indicates strong momentum building around eBay at a share price of...

headline: EBay closes San Francisco office
summary: The marketplace giant also eliminated 800 roles earlier this year as it refocuses its operations on fashion, peer-to-peer sales and resale.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider eBay (EBAY) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
summary: This article examines whether eBay's share price still offers value after a strong run, or whether most of the easy gains may already be behind it, by focusing squarely on what investors are paying for today. With the stock at US$105.63 and returns of 5.6% over 7 days, 17.6% over 30 days, 21.3% year to date and 60.8% over 1 year, plus 157.5% over 3 years and 85.0% over 5 years, many investors are asking how that track record lines up with the current valuation. Recent attention on eBay has...
